events.titleZh: School Holidays at NGV Winter NGV International, The Ian Potter Centre: NGV Australia, Fed Square and online Make the most of these school holidays with an exciting lineup of free workshops and artist-led activities for children, teens and families. Whether you’re looking to learn new art-making skills, join hands-on workshops, or be inspired by the world of art, there is something for everyone to enjoy. Find out more
